metadata.name: Update Project Schedule from Daily Log

description: A PM reviews the daily log and updates the main project schedule based on the reported progress.

nodes.task_description: Review the latest daily log to identify all tasks reported as 'completed'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies 'Install Windows - 3rd Floor' as completed.

nodes.task_description: Update the status of the identified task in the Gantt chart to '100% Complete'.

expected_outcome.value: The task's status is correctly updated in the project schedule.
